text: mzQuality features outlier detection, batch-correction using pooled study quality control samples (SQC), filters for removing unreliable compounds, various plots for inspecting, and generating reports for further processing.
source_excerpt:
mzQuality is a user-friendly R package for quality control of metabolomics 
studies. It features outlier detection, batch-correction using pooled study 
quality control samples (SQC), filters for removing unreliable compounds, 
various plots for inspecting, and generating reports for further processing.

text: mzQuality was developed to perform outlier detection, batch correction and other quality control steps without the need for defined phenotypes.
source_excerpt:
mzQuality was developed to perform
outlier detection, batch correction and other quality control steps
without the need for defined phenotypes.

text: mzQuality follows the recommendations of the mQACC for quality control by leveraging on proper batch design and the addition of various quality control samples.
source_excerpt:
It follows the recommendations
of the mQACC for quality control by leveraging on proper batch design
and the addition of various quality control samples.

text: mzQuality is capable of recommending different internal standards by exhaustively calculating the Relative Standard Deviation of QC samples (RSDQC) of batch-corrected ratios.
source_excerpt:
Additionally, mzQuality is capable of recommending different internal
standards by exhaustively calculating the Relative Standard Deviation of
QC samples (RSDQC) of batch-corrected ratio's.

text: The buildExperiment function automatically calculates the compound / Internal Standard ratio for each sample and stores it in the ratio assay.
source_excerpt:
The `buildExperiment` function will automatically
calculate the compound / Internal Standard ratio for each sample and
store it in the `ratio` assay.

text: The doAnalysis function tests QC samples for outliers using their Compound / Internal Standard ratio.
source_excerpt:
The package tests samples for outliers, specifically for (Pooled)
Quality Control (QC) samples using their Compound / Internal Standard
ratio.

text: The doAnalysis function tests Study Samples for mis-injections using their Internal Standard areas.
source_excerpt:
Furthermore, Study Samples are tested for mis-injections using
their Internal Standard areas.
